data.content: Fixed: Added interactionLog.logPrompt() calls in both the initial session and take-loop spawn paths for non-interactive (Codex) agents. Previously, when dialect \!== 'claude', the prompt was passed as a CLI arg but never logged to history, making it invisible in history logs. Two else branches added in terminal-manager.ts (lines ~1617 and ~1254). All tests pass (1819/1819), typecheck clean.
